creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
You can close this ticket.  yes, there is a problem with clamav 0.97.1, 
with threading and the bytecode compiler which will be fixed in the 
upstream.
In the mean time, users can downgrade to 0.97, or make sure they get a 
current daily.cvd which will disable the bytecode compiler for 0.97.1 only.

upstream fix will be released in 0.97.2 clamav code.
